meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for AI Builders: Overcoming Testing Gaps
content.seo_description: Stop shipping broken code. Learn how to master project management and automated testing workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your clients.
content.answer_block: You don't need a QA degree to ship robust software. By integrating structured project management with AI-driven testing workflows—using Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for automated regression—you can transform your chaotic development process into a predictable, high-velocity engine that guarantees client satisfaction and eliminates production bugs.
content.intro:
The midnight panic is familiar: you’ve pushed the client’s feature, but the subtle side effects are already cascading through the production database. Without a formal testing background, every deployment feels like a gamble, eroding your reputation and consuming your billable hours with frantic hotfixes.

But the era of manual 'click-and-pray' testing is over. By treating your project management as the source of truth for your test cases, you can leverage AI agents to bridge the technical gap. It’s time to stop guessing and start engineering high-reliability apps with the speed of a senior architect.

steps.title: Define Acceptance Criteria as Test Specs
steps.description: Transform client requirements into Gherkin-style test specs within your project management tool to create a clear roadmap for your AI agents.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these project requirements and generate a comprehensive set of BDD test scenarios in Gherkin format. Focus on edge cases and state transitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create test files based on the generated Gherkin scenarios in /tests folder'

steps.title: Automate Architectural Integrity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to audit your codebase structure, ensuring that new features don't violate your core architectural constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project structure against modular monolith best practices and identify potential circular dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor directory structure based on Antigravity architectural audit'

steps.title: Implement AI-Assisted Regression Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wrap critical user flows in automated tests that trigger automatically before any deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test script for the critical user authentication flow, including error state handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create regression tests for authentication and save to /tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts'

steps.title: Continuous Documentation Sync
steps.description: Keep your project management tool updated by having AI agents document the testing status of every feature branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a status report summarizing the current test coverage and failed assertions in the latest build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Update project management board with latest test coverage metrics'

steps.title: Automated Final Validation
steps.description: Establish a final pre-commit hook that forces an AI-driven sanity check before allowing a push to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit script that runs all critical path tests and reports findings to the console.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Configure husky pre-commit hook to run critical path tests'

pro_tips: Treat your project management board as a contract; if a task isn't defined with a 'Definition of Done', the AI agent should refuse to start the build.
Use Claude Code to generate 'negative tests'—specifically ask it to break your code to see if your error handling catches the failure.
Tag your test files with metadata so your AI agent can distinguish between unit, integration, and end-to-end tests during automated runs.
When a test fails, feed the raw stack trace directly into Antigravity to get an architectural root-cause analysis rather than just a code fix.
Maintain a 'Golden Path' document in your repo that the AI agent uses to verify the core business logic remains untouched during refactors.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's test coverage, then integrate the pre-commit hook step to ensure no untested code hits your production branch.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark. Master the intersection of AI and project management to ship faster, reduce churn, and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
